title: Auth form
summary: Login or signup form with validated fields, remember-me, submit button, and error alert.
brief: Build a login page with email + password, a remember-me checkbox, a submit button, and error display.

steps.reason: React Hook Form + zod integration wrapper
Inline error surface for failed sign-in

checklist.check: Password field sets type='password' and autoComplete='current-password'.
Submit button uses loading prop while the request is in flight.
[Form] Avoid: Forgetting to spread {...field} into the form control (connects value/onChange)
[Form] Avoid: Putting FormLabel outside FormItem (loses htmlFor wiring)
[Form] Avoid: Using useForm without a resolver when zod validation is desired
[Form] Avoid: Calling form.handleSubmit without a callback

[Form] A11y: FormControl automatically wires id, aria-describedby, and aria-invalid. FormLabel uses htmlFor matching the control id. Errors are announced via FormMessage with matching aria-describedby.
[Label] Avoid: Forgetting to set htmlFor matching the input's id
[Label] Avoid: Using Label for non-form text content
[Label] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside Label
[Label] A11y: Clicking the label focuses the associated control. Automatically communicates the label to screen readers. Use htmlFor/id pairing, not nesting.
[Input] Avoid: Missing associated Label element for accessibility
[Input] Avoid: Using type='number' without min/max constraints
[Input] Avoid: Not providing placeholder text for context
[Input] A11y: Always pair with a Label using htmlFor/id. Consider aria-describedby for helper text or error messages.
[Checkbox] Avoid: Missing Label pairing
[Checkbox] Avoid: Using onChange instead of onCheckedChange
[Checkbox] Avoid: Forgetting that onCheckedChange can receive 'indeterminate' as well as boolean
[Checkbox] A11y: Always pair with Label via htmlFor/id. Radix handles aria-checked automatically.
[Button] Avoid: Using 'destructive' variant for non-destructive actions
[Button] Avoid: Nesting interactive elements inside asChild button
[Button] Avoid: Missing aria-label when using icon-only size='icon' variant
[Button] Avoid: Using onClick for navigation instead of asChild with a link
[Button] A11y: Automatically handles focus ring, disabled state, and aria attributes. Icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label. Loading state automatically sets disabled.
[Alert] Avoid: Using destructive for non-error messages
[Alert] Avoid: Missing AlertTitle (reduces scannability)
[Alert] Avoid: Stacking multiple Alerts on the same page instead of grouping
[Alert] A11y: Root renders role='alert' so screen readers announce it. For non-urgent info banners consider role='status' or aria-live='polite' via className overrides.
